infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: villie uses your location to find nearby donors, specialists, and events.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: villie uses your location to find nearby donors, specialists, and events.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take profile photos, gear listing photos, and scan product barcodes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to upload profile photos and gear listing photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Save photos you take in villie to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Only used if you record video when listing an item.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Add events you RSVP to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Add events you RSVP to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Share villie with contacts you choose.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Notifications for appointments, new donors, and community messages.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: villie uses your location to find nearby donors, specialists, and events.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow villie to access your camera to take listing photos and scan product barcodes.
plugins.microphonePermission: Only used if you record video when listing an item.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow villie to access your photos to upload profile and listing images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow villie to access your camera to take listing photos.

plugins.calendarPermission: Add events you RSVP to your calendar.
